# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-051](task-0118): Provider Data Validation

## Purpose

Implement provider data validation.

## Scope

- Validation rules
- Schema checking
- Error reporting

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Add schema checking
3. Report errors

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Schema checked
3. Errors reported
